calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-14-2006 Off Calendar

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-08-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order waiving live testimony in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant JULIAN GONZALEZ individually and dba MONTERREY HARVESTING as follows:
Principal $ 46,133.49
Prejudgment Interest $ 1,453.60
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $420.00 for a total of $50,507.09. The court also ordered the possession of the leased equipment.
Judgment signed in open court.
